3089510.name: Somnia
3089510.description:
Somnia is a 2D pixel-art acrobatic platformer set in a cyberpunk re-imagining of the 90s, where you play as Sarah, a young woman stuck in a dull waking life, numbing herself through addiction and escape. Every night when she sleeps, she enters a dream world that offers comfort, control, and permanence... if she stops trying to escape.

Movement is fast and expressive. Sarah can jump, high jump, slide, dive, and vault. Precision matters, but flow matters more.

Something in the dream world wants her to stay.

And it's willing to make that choice for her.
3089510.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
